name: branch-lifecycle
description: Hands-off git branch lifecycle for any repo: pick a branch once per session, auto-commit + push each turn off main, open a PR, arm CI-gated auto-merge on session close, prune merged branches, and warn when a second session shares the working tree. Bundles the branch-choice + git-branch-lifecycle control skills and the session save/restore skills (start-session/end-session/continue) so one install covers the whole session+branch flow. Fully self-contained — every hook and skill works with NO other hub files present; all behavior is toggleable via branch-lifecycle-settings.json (master switch + per-feature off-switches, re-read every session, no reinstall).
